items.title: Regression Shrinkage and Selection via the Lasso (Tibshirani, 1996)
items.author: Robert Tibshirani
items.note: Original Lasso paper defining L1 penalized regression and selection properties.

items.title: Ridge Regression: Biased Estimation for Nonorthogonal Problems (Hoerl & Kennard, 1970)
items.author: Arthur E. Hoerl, Robert W. Kennard
items.note: Foundational Ridge regression paper addressing multicollinearity.

items.title: scikit-learn Ridge and Lasso documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
